title: Hololive Villagers
description: This resource pack changes ordinary residents as well adds another 75± Hololive members using the Name Tag!
body:
![Hololive Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92e4f0011326c25fdbe9e4be896150344efb1f3d_0.webp)

All Hololive Member JP, EN, ID skins for Villager Minecraft

This resource pack uses an OptiFine feature called custom entity models (CEM) to add new models and animations.
IT WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY WITHOUT THIS FEATURE!
As an alternative to Optifine, the combination of Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features can be used for CEM features.

Required:

> [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) > Fabric [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

Name Tag:

Name Tag Only Work for Plains Villager (V2.0 Works for all types of villagers)
